title: OpenZeppelin Contracts for Sui — AI Integrator Index, v1.0
description: Schema for the `index.yaml` discovery files, in two forms distinguished by their keys: (1) the repository-root catalog at `llms/index.yaml`, which enumerates every package (key: `packages`); (2) the per-package index at `<package-path>/llms/index.yaml`, which enumerates a package's modules (key: `modules`). An AI integrator agent / MCP server fetches the root catalog first to discover all packages, then each package index for its module surface, then per-module YAMLs (schema `llms-metadata-v1.json`). The narrative `llms.txt` at the repo root is the human-facing convention entry; these index files are its structured siblings.

schema_version.description: Schema version. v1.0 is the first public release of this format.

repo_ref.description: Full 40-character commit SHA the catalog entries were generated at. Provenance only — each package index's `install.repo_ref` is the authoritative per-package pin.

release.description: Release tag this catalog matches (semver-prefixed), or `null` when generated from main between tags.

name.description: Package name as it appears in `Move.toml`'s `[package].name` field.

group.description: Top-level repository group the package lives under (e.g. `contracts`, `math`).

mvr.description: Move Package Registry slug for the package.

index.description: Repo-root-relative path to the package's per-package index.yaml (e.g. `contracts/access/llms/index.yaml`).

summary.description: Single-sentence summary (≤240 chars). AI agents read this to decide which package index to fetch next.

packages.description: Every package in the repository that ships AI integrator metadata, with a one-line summary and a relative path to its index.yaml.

schema_version.description: Schema version. v1.0 is the first public release of this format.

package.description: Package name as it appears in `Move.toml`'s `[package].name` field.

mvr.description: Move Package Registry slug for this package.

repo_ref.description: Full 40-character commit SHA in OpenZeppelin/contracts-sui that the per-module YAMLs in this package were extracted from. Single source of truth — module YAMLs no longer carry their own `repo_ref`.

release.description: Release tag this index (and the per-module YAMLs under it) matches (semver-prefixed). `null` when extracted from main between tags. In either case, `install.repo_ref` is the actual reproducible pin.

move_toml_snippet.description: `Move.toml` `[dependencies]` snippet pinning the package via MVR. Package-level — applies to every module in the package.

github_alternative.description: Alternative `Move.toml` `[dependencies]` snippet pinning the package via direct git ref — used when MVR is unavailable. The snippet's `rev = "<commit-sha-or-tag>"` is the agent-fills-in slot; `install.repo_ref` above documents the commit this metadata was extracted from.

install.description: Package-level install metadata, hoisted from per-module YAMLs to avoid duplication and drift. The per-module YAML's `install:` block holds only its `use_statement`.

path.description: Relative path from this index file to the module's YAML, mirroring the `sources/` subdirectory layout (e.g., `access_control.yaml`, `ownership_transfer/two_step_transfer.yaml`).

summary.description: Single-sentence summary (≤240 chars) capturing what the module does. AI agents read this to pick which per-module YAML to fetch next.

modules.description: Every public module in the package, with a one-line summary and a relative path to its per-module YAML.
